failure: Seed missing required sections or malformed JSON
redoAction: Regenerate story/evaluation seeds with authority proof attached.
Rebuild story layers and character ledger from canonical story ledger evidence.
ifRetryFails: Block long-form certification or mark insufficient evidence explicitly.

failure: Accepted story ledger auto-accepted degraded long-form layers
redoAction: Require source-aware repair or human/operator review; do not treat as clean.
ifRetryFails: Block author exposure for long-form report.

failure: Pass 1/2 handoff contains generic, broken, or evidence-free recommendations
redoAction: Regenerate the source pass that produced the dirty payload.
ifRetryFails: Quarantine dirty recommendation or fail closed.

failure: Pass 3 emits banned character name or non-canonical alias
redoAction: Sanitize against story ledger canonical entity registry and regenerate affected text.

failure: Duplicate/generic recommendation or criteria contract violation
redoAction: Regenerate synthesis with specificity and score-aware priority constraints.

failure: WAVE derives zero manuscript-specific wave IDs from valid Pass 3 findings
redoAction: Re-run criterion bridge and score-aware wave derivation.
ifRetryFails: Block long-form author exposure or surface degraded WAVE explicitly.

redoAction: Re-run Gate 15; if still fail, route to Phase 5 blocking decision.
ifRetryFails: Block author exposure or require explicit waiver artifact.

failure: Dialogue canon detects impossible dialogue count
redoAction: Re-run dialogue/speech detector against the same manuscript source used for dialogue ratio.
ifRetryFails: Block Phase 5 certification for long-form report.

failure: DREAM score, genre, report type, or entity names diverge from evaluation_result_v2
redoAction: Regenerate DREAM from canonical evaluation_result_v2 and story ledger authority only.
ifRetryFails: Block DREAM sections and author exposure until certified.

kickBackTo: failed producer stage named by audit
redoAction: Repair missing/contradictory artifact and rerun final audit after persistence completes.
Rebuild all renderer projections from the same UnifiedEvaluationDocument hash.

failure: Revision opportunity has no evidence anchor or source location
redoAction: Rebuild opportunity from evaluation evidence or classify as Needs Targeting.
ifRetryFails: Block Revise Queue admission for the affected item.
